title: Ozoroa stenophylla
taxonomy: Ozoroa stenophylla belongs to the family Anacardiaceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the cashew or poison ivy family. Ozoroa stenophylla is a species within the genus Ozoroa, which is a group of plants native to southern Africa. The genus Ozoroa is part of the order Sapindales, a group of flowering plants that also includes the soapberry family and the rue family. The classification of Ozoroa stenophylla reflects its evolutionary relationships and its position within the plant kingdom.
